btc_20pct_drop_probability.description: Based on the agents' discussions, posts, sentiment, concrete price predictions, on-chain reports, and any whale moves discussed in this branch, estimate the probability that BTC drops 20%+ from its current price ($20,500) within the next 24 hours of simulated time. Calibrate based on: consensus among agents (what fraction expect a drop vs hold); intensity of panic vs calm rhetoric; concrete BTC price targets mentioned ("BTC to $14k", "BTC sub-$17k by morning"); reports of institutional/whale selling; correlation arguments (e.g. "if SOL goes, BTC goes"). 0.0 = the branch consensus is that BTC holds; 1.0 = the branch consensus is that BTC will definitely break $16,400.

contagion_breadth_score.description: How wide is the contagion narrative? 0 = isolated to FTX/FTT/SOL only; 5 = mid-cap exchanges and lenders also dragged in; 10 = systemic crypto crisis discussion (BTC/ETH lows, stablecoin contagion, regulatory intervention talk). Score this branch's typical post.

ftx_withdrawal_halt_probability.description: Probability that FTX halts withdrawals within the next 24 simulated hours, inferred from agent discussions of withdrawal queue length, SBF statements, on-chain outflow signals, and prior-collapse comparisons.

panic_score.description: Average sentiment of branch posts about the cascade. 0 = total panic / "get out now" rhetoric; 5 = mixed / debated; 10 = calm / dismissive of contagion risk.

outcome_schema.description: Based on the agents' discussions, posts, sentiment, concrete price predictions, on-chain reports, and any whale moves discussed in this branch, estimate the probability that BTC drops 20%+ from its current price ($20,500) within the next 24 hours of simulated time. Calibrate based on: consensus among agents (what fraction expect a drop vs hold); intensity of panic vs calm rhetoric; concrete BTC price targets mentioned ("BTC to $14k", "BTC sub-$17k by morning"); reports of institutional/whale selling; correlation arguments (e.g. "if SOL goes, BTC goes"). 0.0 = the branch consensus is that BTC holds; 1.0 = the branch consensus is that BTC will definitely break $16,400.
outcome_schema.name: btc_20pct_drop_probability

outcome_schema.description: Probability that FTX halts withdrawals within the next 24 simulated hours, inferred from agent discussions of withdrawal queue length, SBF statements, on-chain outflow signals, and prior-collapse comparisons.
outcome_schema.name: ftx_withdrawal_halt_probability

outcome_schema.description: How wide is the contagion narrative? 0 = isolated to FTX/FTT/SOL only; 5 = mid-cap exchanges and lenders also dragged in; 10 = systemic crypto crisis discussion (BTC/ETH lows, stablecoin contagion, regulatory intervention talk). Score this branch's typical post.
outcome_schema.name: contagion_breadth_score

outcome_schema.description: Average sentiment of branch posts about the cascade. 0 = total panic / "get out now" rhetoric; 5 = mixed / debated; 10 = calm / dismissive of contagion risk.
outcome_schema.name: panic_score

outcome_schema.description: Did 3+ posts discuss the possibility of Binance acquiring FTX?
outcome_schema.name: cz_acquisition_mentioned

outcome_schema.description: Did agents report SOL dropping 30%+ from its $32 starting price?
outcome_schema.name: sol_dump_observed

outcome_schema.description: Did agents express concern about USDT/USDC contagion from the FTX collapse (e.g. "Tether next?")?
outcome_schema.name: stablecoin_contagion_concern

outcome_schema.description: Did 2+ agents mention SEC/CFTC/DOJ likely involvement or specific regulator names as imminently relevant?
outcome_schema.name: regulator_action_anticipated

children.label: nested_market_stabilization_pump
children.perturbation_text: FTX and Alameda Research have released an independently audited proof-of-reserves report confirming full collateralization of all user deposits. A consortium led by Jump Crypto and Circle has committed a $3 billion credit facility to FTX to backstop any potential liquidity gaps. FTT prices have rebounded 25% following the announcement, and BTC has reclaimed the $21,500 support level.

children.label: nested_systemic_contagion_panic
children.perturbation_text: FTX has officially suspended all withdrawals indefinitely, citing an 'unprecedented surge in malicious exit attempts' that has depleted hot wallet reserves. On-chain analysts have identified a massive, unauthorized transfer of $1.2 billion in stablecoins from FTX-linked wallets to unknown addresses. Bitcoin has plummeted to $17,800, and market-wide liquidation cascades are hitting all major DeFi lending protocols.

children.label: nested_regulatory_uncertainty_stall
children.perturbation_text: The SEC and CFTC have issued a joint statement announcing a formal investigation into the relationship between Alameda Research and FTX, freezing all U.S.-based accounts pending a full audit. Regulators have requested detailed documentation on stablecoin collateralization practices, leaving the market in a state of suspended animation. Trading volume has collapsed as participants wait for further guidance, and BTC remains flat at $19,200 with no clear directional trend.

children.label: stabilizing_bailout_rumor
children.perturbation_text: FTX and Alameda Research have announced a strategic capital injection from a consortium of private equity firms, including Sequoia and Paradigm, to bolster liquidity. SBF has confirmed that all customer withdrawal requests are being processed with priority to ensure platform stability. FTT prices have recovered to $21.50 following the update.

children.label: escalating_withdrawal_halt
children.perturbation_text: FTX has officially suspended all withdrawals for retail and institutional accounts, citing 'unprecedented liquidity demands' and technical maintenance. Reports from on-chain analysts indicate that the FTX hot wallet balance has dropped to near zero. BTC has plummeted to $18,200 as market participants scramble to exit all exchange-based positions.

children.label: ambiguous_regulatory_probe
children.perturbation_text: The SEC has issued a formal inquiry into the relationship between Alameda Research and FTX, requesting detailed documentation on collateralization practices. SBF has pledged full cooperation, though he remains silent on the status of the $2.1 billion FTT liquidation by Binance. Markets remain flat as traders weigh the risk of a prolonged legal battle against the possibility of a clean bill of health.

children.label: solana_ecosystem_collapse
children.perturbation_text: Massive forced liquidations have hit the Solana blockchain as Alameda-linked wallets begin dumping SOL to cover margin calls. SOL has dropped 45% in under an hour, triggering a wave of cascading liquidations across Mango Markets and Solend. DeFi protocols are struggling to process the volume of underwater collateral being auctioned off.

children.label: institutional_bank_run
children.perturbation_text: Several major institutional market makers have publicly announced the termination of their liquidity provision agreements with FTX, citing extreme counterparty risk. On-chain data confirms that over $500 million in stablecoins has been withdrawn from the exchange by 'whale' addresses in the last two hours. BTC has broken support at $19,000, signaling a shift to a broader risk-off environment.

children.label: euphoric_market_rebound
children.perturbation_text: CZ has abruptly deleted his previous posts regarding the FTT liquidation, citing a 'misunderstanding' after a private conversation with SBF. Alameda Research has released an audited statement showing $15 billion in diversified liquid assets, effectively silencing the rumors. BTC has surged 10% in fifteen minutes, and FTT has reclaimed its $25 level.

children.label: stablecoin_depeg_fear
children.perturbation_text: Fears over Tether's exposure to FTX and Alameda have triggered a 2% depeg of USDT against the dollar on Curve Finance. The panic has spread to USDC as users rush to redeem stablecoins for fiat, causing massive slippage across major DEX pools. Total market capitalization of the crypto sector has dropped by over $100 billion in four hours.

children.label: cynical_trader_retreat
children.perturbation_text: FTX and Binance have announced a 'cooperation agreement' involving a temporary freeze on FTT trading to prevent further volatility. Most analysts describe the move as a desperate attempt to buy time before an inevitable insolvency filing. BTC remains stuck in a tight, low-volume range at $19,500, with no clear direction from either buyers or sellers.
